title: mallotus canii
intro: Mallotus canii, also known as the Indian root, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mallotus canii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of a paste or powder, which can be applied topically or taken orally.
